meaning: vi.到处走动,行走,滑步而舞,大摇大摆地走n.一种方块舞,快滑舞步,远足
examples: Rats and roaches and snakes sashay through the gutters.
Defying gravity, the stream of animals sashay across our field of vision, moving at his or her own accord in a time warped space.
An elderly woman in pajamas will be chopping vegetables on the stoop of her lane house, while a Prada-clad beauty will sashay past on her way to a nearby art gallery.
Discover Dixie just a sashay away with today's extravagant Escape to Cape May's The Southern Mansion.
Perhaps his best shot came when Lewis was punched back over his head for yet another four after a delightful little sashay down the wicket.
